task:motif_violation_label.annotation_hint: set "annotation" to one [x0, y0, x1, y1] box in image pixel coordinates for the selected wallpaper panel
task:motif_violation_label.answer_hint: set "answer" to the selected panel letter

task:same_pattern_as_reference_label.annotation_hint: set "annotation" to a JSON object with keys "reference_panel" and "selected_panel", each mapped to one [x0, y0, x1, y1] box in image pixel coordinates
task:same_pattern_as_reference_label.answer_hint: set "answer" to the selected panel letter
